product_overview: Saver-UR is a web-based universal media downloader that lets users paste any public image or video URL, preview metadata and media, configure filename/quality, and download the media to their device. Authenticated users can view and manage a local saved-history via Clerk.
core_goals: Allow users to paste any public image or video URL and download the exact media to their device
Fetch and display media metadata and previews quickly to confirm what will be downloaded
Provide simple file naming and quality/type selection before downloading
Persist download history locally and allow authenticated users to re-download or delete entries
Secure protected pages with Clerk authentication and surface clear auth UI in the navbar
Deliver a fast, mobile-first UI with clear error handling and storage usage warnings

features.name: Home Landing Page
features.description: Landing page with hero section, feature highlights, and call-to-action buttons that guide users to start the download flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with headline and live badge -> Click "Start Downloading" button -> See UrlPage at /url
Navigate to / -> Scroll to features and bottom CTA -> Click "Try it out" button -> See UrlPage at /url
Navigate to / -> Click "Start Downloading" button -> See UrlPage at /url -> Leave URL input empty -> Click "Next Step" -> See validation error message prompting for a valid URL

features.name: URL Paste and Metadata Fetch
features.description: Two-step downloader step 1: user pastes a URL, app requests metadata from the backend and shows title/thumbnail/formats before proceeding.
user_flows: Navigate to /url -> Paste a URL into the input field -> Click "Next Step" button to submit -> See loading spinner while fetching metadata -> See metadata preview (title, thumbnail, formats) -> Proceed to step 2

Navigate to /url -> Paste a YouTube or direct media URL into the input field -> Click "Next Step" button -> See loading spinner -> See metadata preview including quality options -> Select a quality option to enable download
Navigate to /url -> Paste an invalid or malformed URL into the input field -> Click "Next Step" button -> See loading spinner -> See error message if URL is invalid or backend unreachable

features.name: Media Download Configuration and Download
features.description: Step 2: configure filename, media type/quality, preview media, and trigger download; successful downloads produce a toast and save metadata to localStorage.
user_flows: Navigate to /url -> See current URL in summary bar with option to change it -> Edit the File Name input -> Select media type (Image or Video) -> Select download quality from dropdown (if available) -> View media preview or thumbnail -> Click "Download Media" button -> See success message 'Downloaded successfully!' -> Item saved to localStorage history

Navigate to /download -> Paste or confirm URL in form -> Edit file name -> Select media type and quality -> Click "Download Media" button -> Hidden anchor triggers GET /api/download?... -> Download begins in browser and content is saved with chosen filename

Navigate to /url -> Configure file name and select media type -> Click "Download Media" button -> See loading indicator while contacting backend -> Backend unreachable or returns error -> See error message 'Download failed' -> No item saved to history

features.name: Saved History
features.description: Authenticated page that lists previously downloaded items (from localStorage), allowing re-download, delete, and clear-all actions, with storage usage indicators and empty state handling.
user_flows: Navigate to /saved -> Sign in via Clerk if prompted -> See list of saved download history cards with URL, name, type, and timestamp -> Click download icon on a saved card -> See download start and success toast -> Saved item remains in history
Navigate to /saved -> Sign in via Clerk -> Click delete icon on a saved card -> Confirm deletion -> See card removed from list and localStorage updated -> See updated storage usage indicator in KB
Navigate to /saved -> Sign in via Clerk -> Click "Clear All" button -> Confirm clear all in browser dialog -> See empty state message 'No saved URLs yet. Start downloading!'
Navigate to /saved while signed out -> See 'Content Protected' message blocking content (no saved items shown) -> Use Navbar "Sign In" to open Clerk modal to authenticate

features.name: Clerk Authentication
features.description: Sign-in/sign-out flows using Clerk modal. The /saved route is protected and the Navbar shows sign-in button or user avatar based on auth state.
user_flows: Navigate to any page -> Click "Sign In" button in the Navbar -> Clerk modal opens -> Sign in with Clerk credentials -> See user avatar (UserButton) in Navbar
Navigate to any page -> Click user avatar (UserButton) in Navbar -> Click sign out -> See Navbar revert to "Sign In" button
Navigate to /saved while signed out -> See 'Content Protected' message -> Click "Sign In" in Navbar -> Clerk modal opens -> Close modal without signing in -> Still see 'Content Protected' message

features.name: Navbar Navigation
features.description: Fixed top navbar with Saver-UR branding, nav links to app pages, and Clerk auth controls including mobile hamburger menu behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to any page -> Click Saver-UR logo in Navbar -> See Home page at /
Navigate to any page -> Click "URL Downloader" nav link -> See UrlPage at /url -> Click "Download Entry" nav link -> See Download page at /download

Navigate to any page while signed out -> Click "Saved History" nav link -> Attempt to open /saved -> See 'Content Protected' message (saved page requires Clerk sign-in) -> Use Navbar "Sign In" to authenticate
On mobile viewport -> Click hamburger menu -> Click a nav link in mobile menu -> See corresponding route load and mobile menu close

routes.description: Landing page with hero section, feature highlights, and call-to-action to start downloading
Main URL downloader page with a two-step form to paste a URL, preview media, and download
Alternate direct download entry point, also uses the UrlInputForm component
Saved history page showing all previously downloaded URLs, requires Clerk sign-in

features.name: Home Landing Page
features.description: Hero section welcoming users to Saver-UR with feature highlights (Universal URLs, Fast Downloads, Safe & Secure) and CTA buttons
user_interactions: View hero section with headline and live badge
Click "Start Downloading" button to navigate to /url
View feature highlights section (Universal URLs, Lightning Fast, Safe & Secure)
Click "Try it out" button at the bottom CTA section

features.name: URL Paste and Metadata Fetch
features.description: Step 1 of the downloader - user pastes a URL and the app fetches metadata (title, thumbnail, formats) from the backend
user_interactions: Paste a URL into the input field
Click "Next Step" button to submit
See loading spinner while fetching metadata
See error message if URL is invalid or backend unreachable
Proceed to step 2 on success

features.name: Media Download Configuration and Download
features.description: Step 2 of the downloader - user configures file name, media type or quality format, previews content, and triggers download
user_interactions: View current URL in summary bar with option to change it
Edit the file name in the File Name input
Select media type (Image or Video) for generic URLs
Select download quality from a dropdown for YouTube/social URLs
View media preview or YouTube thumbnail/metadata
Click "Download Media" button to start download
See success message after download triggers
Item saved to localStorage history automatically

features.name: Saved History
features.description: Authenticated users can view, re-download, and delete previously downloaded media entries stored in localStorage
user_interactions: View list of all saved download history cards
Click download icon on a saved card to re-trigger download
Click delete icon on a saved card to remove it from history
Click "Clear All" button to remove all saved history
Confirm clear all in browser dialog
View storage usage indicator in KB
See storage warning when usage exceeds 4MB
See empty state message if no saved items

features.name: Clerk Authentication
features.description: Users can sign in or sign out via Clerk modal. The /saved route is protected and shows a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users
user_interactions: Click "Sign In" button in the Navbar to open Clerk modal
Sign in with Clerk credentials
See user avatar (UserButton) in Navbar when signed in
Click user avatar to sign out
Navigate to /saved while signed out and see "Content Protected" message

features.name: Navbar Navigation
features.description: Fixed top navbar with Saver-UR branding, nav links, and Clerk auth button/profile
user_interactions: Click Saver-UR logo to go to home
Click "Home", "URL Downloader", "Download Entry", "Saved History" nav links
Click hamburger menu on mobile to toggle mobile nav
Click nav links in mobile menu to navigate

known_limitations.issue: The /saved page requires Clerk login; unauthenticated users only see a "Content Protected" message with no redirect or sign-in button directly on the page
known_limitations.impact: Users unaware of Clerk must use Navbar sign-in button

known_limitations.issue: Download is triggered by creating a hidden anchor element pointing to the backend API; if the backend is not running on port 5000, downloads will silently fail
known_limitations.impact: No graceful degradation if backend is down

known_limitations.issue: Saved history is stored in localStorage only, not synced to a remote database per user account
known_limitations.impact: History is not portable across devices or browsers
